first_run.rationale: The scores are identical (6/10), and the core reasoning is consistent across both evaluations. Both versions praise the candidate's high-throughput systems experience and AI tooling work, while raising identical primary concerns about the lack of Python and limited strategic ownership. The minor differences in phrasing, ordering of points, and the substitution of one minor concern (niche stack) for another (no on-call experience) are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and are not plausibly linked to the change in the candidate's name.
